_meta.purpose: Marketing firewall deny-list. The path prefixes the OPERATOR owns and rewrites. The engine never edits these.
_meta.enforcement: STAGED, NOT WIRED. engine/hooks/guard-marketing.js reads this file and would block a Write/Edit to any match — but it is intentionally NOT registered in .claude/settings.json this pass (operator's 'let holes show on first run' mode). Until wired, this list is documentation the executing agent honors.
_meta.to_enforce: Add a PreToolUse Write|Edit|MultiEdit hook to .claude/settings.json calling guard-marketing.js, then flip _meta.enforcement to WIRED.

off_limits_after_split._note: These become off-limits once the A1/A3 extractions land. Path-level guards can't sub-target line ranges, so the WHOLE file flips to marketing-owned only after its wiring is extracted out.
